title: Reasons to Retain Seagate (STX) in Your Portfolio For Now

title: Seagate Report: Multicloud Friction Is Tricky, but Winning Companies Know How to Hack It
text: FREMONT, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today's multicloud is a mix of clouds that don't communicate well. As multicloud complexity and the related costs are on the rise, the friction leads to data lock-in—and the resulting loss of business value. But it doesn't have to be that way, says a new industry report. title: Seagate Technology: Improved Fundamentals & Recovering Technicals
text: Seagate has managed to improve its fundamentals despite a challenging macro backdrop. Recently it also consolidated the losses on its technicals with contracting volatility.
